ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the article can be found */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the article belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the article */,
  "publication_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the article was published */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the article in the news feed */,
  "is_opinion" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is an opinion piece */,
  "is_ad" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is an advertisement */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the article is written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent topic (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "topic_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the news source (e.g., online, print) */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, researcher, analyst) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the article */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, share, comment) */,
  "engagement_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of engagement */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_engagement_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "ad_url" TEXT /* URL of the advertisement */,
  "ad_source" TEXT /* Source of the advertisement */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the advertisement */,
  "ad_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the ad is displayed (in seconds) */,
  "ad_impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_types" (
  "engagement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement type */,
  "engagement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engagement type (e.g., view, share) */,
  "engagement_description" TEXT /* Description of the engagement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
